g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Step Function pass source_bucket and source_key to Glue?')
sendPrompt('What does the delimiter corruption check do in the Glue ETL?')
g.text: Read raw lines, count cols per row vs header

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Glue read the CSV file from S3 into a DynamicFrame?')
sendPrompt('What does the Spark-level corruption check detect in the Glue ETL?')
g.text: No columns, empty df, null-heavy rows

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the SQL query do to the column data types in Glue?')
g.text: REGEXP_REPLACE strips symbols, CAST to DOUBLE/INT

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does drop_nulls work in the Glue ETL pipeline?')
g.text: Remove columns where all values are null

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the deduplication step work in the Glue ETL?')
sendPrompt('What data quality rules are evaluated in the Glue ETL?')
sendPrompt('How does the Glue ETL write to the Silver S3 layer and update the catalog?')
g.text: Parquet + Snappy, partition by category, update catalog
